context.projectOverview: Phase 6 — The Medical Team. S6 is the integration linchpin: wire the FULL ordered SOP into MedicalSopEngine.run and make zero-egress the CODE-ENFORCED default (two opt-in egress axes default FALSE; scoped ESLint network boundary; medications from bi-temporal FactStore). Default outbound bytes = 0.

criticalConstraints: EgressGuard (suggest src/medical/egress.ts): two INDEPENDENT axes 'cloud-inference' and 'literature-retrieval', BOTH default false. assertAllowed(axis) THROWS when the axis is off, passes when on. Enabling one axis must NOT enable the other (independence tested).

Scoped ESLint no-restricted-imports: add a `files: ['src/medical/**/*.ts']` block to eslint.config.js MIRRORING the telemetry block (eslint.config.js ~42-69 / src/telemetry/emit.ts). Forbid undici/got/axios/node-fetch/node:http/node:https/node:net/node:tls AND the fetch global everywhere in src/medical EXCEPT the ONE designated retrieval network file (reserve the exception path for the S7 retriever, e.g. src/medical/literature/retriever.ts — match the path you stub in this sprint). `npm run lint` MUST pass with 0 errors.

LiteratureRetriever (STUB this sprint, suggest src/medical/literature/retriever.ts at the ESLint-excepted path): retrieve() returns { disabled } SYNCHRONOUSLY when literature-retrieval is OFF — NO network attempt and NO network import yet (the real MedlinePlus call is S7). The engine ABSTAINS when retrieval is disabled.

Medications: read via FactStore.getActiveFacts under a MEDICAL scope (bi-temporal, value-of-record, ADR-7) — see briefing for the exact getActiveFacts(scope) call. HealthDataStore is NEVER used to store medication-list state.

Wire the FULL ordered SOP into MedicalSopEngine.run: consent (Gate 1) -> red-flag (Gate 2) -> numerics (via NumericsQueryLayer / deps.numerics) -> meds (FactStore.getActiveFacts) -> egress check -> (retriever disabled => abstain) -> disclaimer footer -> audit (answer|abstain entry) -> PipelineResult. NO LLM/numerics/network call may precede the gates. A numeric question must be answered PURELY from deterministic compute. With both axes off, a full turn produces a MedicalAnswer with footer + an audit answer/abstain entry, and default outbound bytes = 0 (no network module reachable).
deps.numerics is now actually CALLED by the engine — so the injected spy seam becomes live. Inject opts.now on the real SOP path (address the S2 wall-clock-fallback carry-forward per the briefing).

CARRY-FORWARD CLEANUPS (REQUIRED this sprint): (a) in src/medical/engine.test.ts, the original sc-2-4 fail-closed test creates llmSpy/numericsSpy but does NOT inject them into the engine ctor — inject them now (deps.llmClient/numerics) and make the never-called assertion REAL; (b) in src/medical/numerics.test.ts, convert the readFileSync source-grep test to `await readFile(...)` from node:fs/promises (the only sync-fs violation in the repo).

ESM/NodeNext .js extensions; strict TS; no SDK types outside src/providers/. Tests use temp dirs (no fs mocks). Add types additively to src/medical/types.ts. Keep MedicalSopEngine's zero-arg constructor working (selector.ts:126 calls new MedicalSopEngine()).

nonGoals: do NOT implement the REAL MedlinePlus network retrieval or cited synthesis (that is S7 — only the disabled stub + ESLint exception path here). Do NOT build a cloud-inference synth path (axis exists + defaults off only).
